name: Charter Senior Living at Gateway Park
description: Come play pickleball at Charter Senior Living at Gateway Park in Greenfield, IN! There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Hancock County Memorial Building
description: Come play pickleball at Hancock County Memorial Building in Greenfield, IN! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Mt Vernon High School - Fortville
description: Come play pickleball at Mt Vernon High School - Fortville in Fortville, IN! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Riley Park Greenfield
description: Riley Park Greenfield is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenfield, IN. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Riley Park & Splash Pad
description: Come play pickleball at Riley Park & Splash Pad in Greenfield, IN! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
